p.t: All 23 project assignments have been simplified to reduce scope and complexity. The core domain idea and learning objectives remain intact. The changes make these projects achievable within a bootcamp timeframe while still covering the key backend engineering concepts (REST APIs, relational data modeling, background jobs, file storage, access control).

h2.t: What Was Removed Across All Projects

li.t: — Long-running orchestration workflows were removed. Where applicable, simple scheduled jobs or state-machine transitions replace them.

— IoT sensors, OCR receipt processing, KYC/AML e-KYC, BGV criminal checks, sentiment analysis APIs, wearable device integrations, and logistics aggregators have all been removed. Where verification is needed, manual admin review replaces it.
— 21 CFR Part 11 electronic signatures, NPCI/RBI mandate penalties, CDSCO audit immutability, and blockchain-linked document hashing have been removed.
— Flash-sale inventory locking, 500ms alert delivery SLAs, 5,000+ batch onboarding in 24 hours, and mass-outage grouping of 10,000 tickets have been removed.
— Combo-SKU free-item triggers, travel-buffer traffic algorithms, family-tree guest tagging, and cross-state green-tax geo-restrictions have been removed.

p.t: 1. B2B FMCG Distributor
Removed: UOM conversions, Temporal credit cycle, flash-sale concurrency, SMS OTP, combo-SKU logic. Kept: tiered pricing, GST, credit limits, partial delivery.
2. Solar Farm Task Mgmt
Removed: GPS geo-fencing, Temporal maintenance sprints, offline sync-later. Kept: 3-level hierarchy, predecessor dependencies, SLA tracking, milestone invoicing.
3. Geriatric Home-Care
Removed: Traffic buffer algorithm, Temporal session monitoring, tele-consult API. Kept: care plan subscriptions, conflict detection, refund policy, check-in alerts.
4. Vocational Portal
Removed: Video liveness questions, proctored exams, BGV integration, spotty-connection handling. Kept: prerequisites, multi-language, certificate generation, bulk enrollment.
5. Cloud Kitchen
Removed: Real-time market rate COGS, Swiggy/Zomato sync, Temporal, KDS preparation estimates. Kept: shared inventory, order state machine, void orders, time-based menu.
6. Agri-Advisory
Removed: ML pest identification API, auto-translation, Temporal weather alerts. Kept: geo-tagged feed, expert badge, district alerts, rate limiting.
7. Construction Petty Cash
Removed: OCR receipt processing, GSTIN verification API, Tally XML export, 3-level approval. Kept: budget heads, 2-level approval, advance tracking, CSV export.
8. Fractional CRE
Removed: AML checks, Aadhaar e-KYC, TDS deduction, quarterly exit windows, Temporal. Kept: fractional units, manual KYC, dividend calculation, funding goal refund.
9. Wedding Management
Removed: Mass SMS for venue change, Temporal countdown, family-tree tagging. Kept: milestone payments, guest list, budget variance, vendor overbooking check.
10. Gig Worker Onboarding
Removed: PAN/Aadhaar 3rd-party verification, Temporal, 5,000+ batch hiring. Kept: 4-stage funnel, document upload, reminders, duplicate prevention, re-activation.
11. Pharma Cold Chain
Removed: IoT sensor integration, Temporal quarantine workflow, CDSCO audit logs. Kept: FEFO, batch tracking, manual temperature logs, recall traceability.
12. Corporate Wellness
Removed: Wearable API integrations, insurance premium linking, Temporal challenges. Kept: manual activity logging, points, leaderboard, anonymized HR reports.
13. Fintech Dispute Mgmt
Removed: CBS integration, Temporal chargeback lifecycle, mass-outage 10K grouping. Kept: ticket categorization, 2-tier SLA escalation, auto-refund, PII masking.
14. Legal Archive
Removed: Full-text search via 3rd party, Chinese wall, physical-digital sync, Temporal. Kept: matter-level access, metadata search, billable time, retention flags.
15. Corporate Stay
Removed: Direct-bill hotel integration, Temporal approval expiry, passport/visa deletion. Kept: grade-based caps, cost center tagging, out-of-policy approval, GST invoice.
16. Pharma SOP CMS
Removed: 21 CFR Part 11 e-sign compliance, Temporal periodic review, dynamic watermarking. Kept: version locking, read receipts, review reminders, PDF export with watermark.
17. EV Fleet
Removed: MQTT/IoT telemetry, remote immobilization, Temporal swap reservations. Kept: manual shift logs, payout calculation, battery health flags, maintenance scheduling.
18. Automotive VoC
Removed: 3rd-party sentiment analysis, IVR calls, audio transcription, Temporal. Kept: milestone-triggered surveys, star rating, low-score alerts, loyalty points.
19. Society Billing
Removed: RFID access revocation, Temporal suspension workflow, split payouts. Kept: tiered water billing, late fees, pro-rated billing, bulk advance payment.
20. Hospital Diet Kitchen
Removed: HIS system sync, room-level route optimization, Temporal meal timing. Kept: diet restrictions, allergen block, dietitian approval, discharge cancellation.
21. Fintech Alerting
Removed: WhatsApp/Push channels, IVR calls, 500ms SLA, Temporal conditional workflows. Kept: Email + SMS, priority queues, user preferences, rate limiting, digest batching.
22. Title Deed Registry
Removed: Blockchain hashing, Aadhaar e-Sign API, Temporal lien release. Kept: hierarchical access, expiry alerts, multi-party PDF signing, duplicate prevention.
23. Scrap Auction
Removed: Reverse auctions, PCB license API verification, geo-restrictions, logistics quotes. Kept: forward auction, auto-increment bidding, weight variance invoice, dispute flag.
